behaviors.description: `=SUM(A1:A10)` returns the correct total for A1..A10.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit test of `SUM` over a raw numeric array catches arithmetic bugs only; Integration test through parser -> range resolver -> function dispatcher -> evaluator catches off-by-one range bounds and cell coercion bugs. Lower level miss: a pure `SUM` unit test will pass even if `A1:A10` is resolved as `A1:A9`.
behaviors.test_description: Create a workbook grid with A1..A10 populated, set target cell to `=SUM(A1:A10)`, run full evaluation pipeline, assert exact sum and that changing A10 updates result accordingly.

behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit test of expression math catches operator logic; Integration test of dependency resolution + evaluation order catches stale/intermediate value propagation bugs. Lower level miss: math unit tests pass while engine fails to re-evaluate `C1` from updated `B1`.
behaviors.test_description: Set `A1`, `B1` as `=A1*2`, `C1` as `=B1+1`, evaluate, assert `C1`; then update `A1` and assert recomputed cascaded result.

behaviors.description: Circular dependency (A1<->B1) returns circular-reference error instead of looping.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit test of cycle-detection helper graph catches algorithm defects; Integration test with real formula references catches parser/reference graph wiring failures. Lower level miss: cycle detector unit passes while dependency graph is built incorrectly from formula tokens and loop is not flagged.
behaviors.test_description: Set `A1` to `=B1` and `B1` to `=A1`, trigger evaluation, assert circular-reference error type/code and no infinite evaluation loop.

behaviors.description: `VLOOKUP` exact match returns correct value; missing key returns lookup error.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit test of lookup routine over in-memory table catches matching logic; Integration test through formula parser + range extraction + function call catches column-index/range-shape handoff bugs. Lower level miss: lookup routine passes but engine passes wrong table slice or key type.
behaviors.test_description: Populate lookup table cells, evaluate `VLOOKUP(..., FALSE)` for present and absent keys, assert returned value and expected not-found error.

behaviors.description: Nested `IF` conditions produce correct branch output.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit test of IF evaluator on prebuilt AST catches branch logic; Integration test including parse + nested evaluation catches nesting/precedence and cell-value coercion issues. Lower level miss: IF unit passes while parser builds wrong nested tree.
behaviors.test_description: Set `A1` to representative values (e.g., 5, 15, 25), evaluate `=IF(A1>10, IF(A1>20, "high", "medium"), "low")`, assert expected outputs.

behaviors.description: `CONCATENATE` joins values with separator and skips empty cells.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit test of string-join helper catches join rules; Integration test through cell fetch + empty-cell semantics + function eval catches blank-vs-empty-cell representation bugs. Lower level miss: join helper passes while engine supplies empty-string placeholders for empty cells.
behaviors.test_description: Populate mixed non-empty and empty cells, evaluate CONCATENATE formula with separators, assert output excludes separators for skipped empties per spec.

behaviors.description: Cross-sheet reference (e.g., `=Sheet2!A1+1`) resolves when target sheet exists.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit test of reference parser catches tokenization; Integration test of workbook/sheet registry + reference resolver + evaluator catches wrong-sheet binding bugs. Lower level miss: parser unit passes while runtime resolver cannot locate `Sheet2` in workbook context.
behaviors.test_description: Create workbook with Sheet1 and Sheet2, set `Sheet2!A1`, evaluate formula on Sheet1 referencing Sheet2, assert correct value.

behaviors.description: When an input cell changes, dependents recalculate in correct topological order.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit test of topological-sort function catches ordering algorithm bugs; Integration test of change notification + dependency graph + recompute scheduler catches stale-cache and partial-recompute defects. Lower level miss: topo sort passes but update event does not enqueue all dependents.
behaviors.test_description: Build a dependency chain/diamond, evaluate once, mutate a root cell, trigger recompute, assert all downstream values and that no dependent uses stale predecessor values.

behaviors.description: Undo after formula edit restores formula text and prior dependent computed values.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit test of undo stack catches command history logic; Integration test of undo stack + formula storage + recalculation engine catches state-rollback gaps. Lower level miss: undo stack unit passes while recalculated dependents remain from post-edit state.
behaviors.test_description: Edit a formula affecting dependents, verify new values, perform undo, assert original formula text and all dependent cells return to pre-edit computed values.

behaviors.description: Save/load workbook round-trip preserves formulas, values, and floating-point precision.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: Unit test of serializer functions on isolated structs catches encoding logic; Integration test of workbook model + binary serializer/deserializer + filesystem round-trip catches schema/version mapping and precision-loss bugs across module boundaries. Higher-level rejection: System was considered, but behavior text only requires local disk round-trip correctness, not OS-level timing/subprocess/network behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Create workbook with formulas and sensitive floating-point values, save to a temp file, load back via normal API, assert formulas unchanged and numeric values within exact/required precision tolerance.
